title: Nauticlysm
description: Adding new nautilus mobs with different variants for ocean biomes!
body: # Nauticlysm - Nauticlysm is datapack that adds 6 new nautilus mobs! - new mobs can be picked up using water bucket(by punching them) and placed anywhere! ## Variants - Common: Classic nautilus mob that drops classic nautilus shell. > + Found in ocean biomes - Coral: Coral reef nautilus mobs that drops new colorful nautilus shells. > + Found in coral reefs biomes(ex. warm ocean) - Use command ```function animated_java:nauticlysm/mech/buckets_give```to get buckets of all nautilus mobs ## Credits and Links - Original Texture and Model By [TaxingHawk](https://modrinth.com/user/TaxingHawk) - **BisectHosting Is Minecraft Server Hosting That Proves Players With an Easy and Affordable Way to Hoster their Minecraft Server! Get 25% Off For your First Month By Using My Code!** + Support me on Kofi! [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/K3K1KNLTA)
